summary: Account Management System testing complete. All 22 backend API tests and 26 frontend E2E tests passed. Created new test suites for email-based auth, forgot/reset password flows, and account settings. Updated existing specs to use email-based authentication.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix and UUIDs. Test users created dynamically per test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Account management system fully tested. All existing specs updated to use email-based auth (login-email, login-password, login-btn instead of login-username-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn). TEST_USER updated with email field. Forgot password and reset password flows tested. Account settings page tested including profile editing, password change, and account deletion.

features_tested.email_registration: PASS - User can register with email, username, password
features_tested.email_login: PASS - User can login with email and password
features_tested.forgot_password_api: PASS - Returns success message without email enumeration
features_tested.account_profile_api: PASS - Returns user profile without password hash
features_tested.update_username: PASS - Updates username and returns new token
features_tested.change_password: PASS - Changes password, old password invalid, new works
features_tested.delete_account: PASS - Deletes user and all associated data
features_tested.account_settings_ui_password: PASS - Password match indicator, disabled button when mismatch
